story.iWant: a dashboard that shows my project's current phase and next recommended workflow, supported by a flexible database schema
story.soThat: I can start the right workflow with the right context
story.tasks: - [ ] Task 1: Schema Refactor (AC: 1) - [ ] Modify `packages/db/src/schema/workflows.ts` to add `tags`, `metadata` - [ ] Remove obsolete columns from `workflows.ts` - [ ] Update types/interfaces in `packages/db` and `packages/api` - [ ] Run migration/push to update local DB - [ ] Task 2: Seed Data (AC: 2) - [ ] Create/Update seed file `packages/scripts/src/seeds/workflows.ts` (or similar) - [ ] Add `brainstorming` workflow with `tags: { phase: "0", type: "method" }` - [ ] Ensure `artifactTemplate` reference is set - [ ] Task 3: Dashboard UI Implementation (AC: 3, 4, 5) - [ ] Create `apps/web/src/routes/dashboard.tsx` (or update existing) - [ ] Implement Phase 0 visualization (Active/Pending state) - [ ] Add "Start Brainstorming" button - [ ] Connect button to `useWorkflow` hook or API to start execution - [ ] Verify context (project details) is passed to reference

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. **Schema Refactor:** Update `workflows` table to support flexible metadata: - ADD: `tags` (JSONB) for filtering (e.g., `type: "technique"`, `phase: "discovery"`) - ADD: `metadata` (JSONB) for UI configuration - REMOVE: `module`, `agentId`, `initializerType`, `isStandalone`, `requiresProjectContext` (move these to `metadata` or `tags` if still needed, or remove if obsolete) 2. **Seed Workflow (Shell):** Seed the `brainstorming` workflow entry with correct `tags` and `artifactTemplate` (steps array can be empty shell for now). 3. **Dashboard UI:** Implement the Project Dashboard showing Phase 0 (Discovery + Analysis) status. 4. **Routing Logic:** "Start Brainstorming" button uses `workflow_paths` (or direct workflow lookup via tags) to determine availability. 5. **Context Passing:** Clicking Start initiates the workflow engine with the project name/description context.

artifact.title: Epic 2: Artifact Workbench
artifact.snippet: Defines the dashboard requirements (Phase 0 status, Start Brainstorming button) and schema updates (tags/metadata JSONB) needed to support flexible workflow routing.

artifact.title: Database Schema Architecture
artifact.snippet: Defines original `workflows` table structure (id, name, module, agentId...). This baseline is refactored in Story 2.1 to replace rigid columns with flexible `tags` and `metadata` JSONB fields.

artifact.title: Chiron UI Wireframes v1.0
artifact.snippet: Visual design for the Phase 0 Dashboard showing project status, active agents, and the 'Next Recommended Action' (Brainstorming) button.

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: FR016: Multi-Agent Dashboard showing active/queued/idle agents. FR020: Phase Navigation showing 4-phase progression.

artifact.reason: Target for schema refactor. Current definition includes rigid columns (module, agentId, etc.) that must be replaced/moved to flexible JSONB fields (tags, metadata).
Seeding logic needs to be updated to populate the new `tags` and `metadata` fields instead of the removed columns during workflow initialization.
Current dashboard implementation is a placeholder. Needs to be replaced with the Phase 0 visualization and action buttons defined in wireframes.

story-context.constraints: - **Schema Evolution:** Changes to `workflows` table must use Drizzle migration workflow (`db:generate`, `db:push`). - **Flexible Configuration:** Use `tags` JSONB for all future categorizations to avoid schema churn (Decision #7). - **Type Safety:** Ensure Drizzle `.$type<T>()` is used for JSONB fields to maintain TypeScript safety. - **UI Consistency:** Dashboard must match Wireframe v1.0 layout and use shared UI components where possible.

interface.name: WorkflowMetadata
interface.signature: interface WorkflowMetadata { icon?: string; color?: string; recommendedFor?: string[] }

tests.standards: Follow `docs/architecture/TESTING-DYNAMIC-AGENTS.md` patterns where applicable. Use `bun test` for backend/schema tests. UI tests should verify component rendering state.
tests.ideas: 1. **Schema Test:** Verify `workflows` table accepts `tags` and `metadata` JSONB data. 2. **Seed Test:** Run `db:seed` and verify `brainstorming` workflow exists with correct tags. 3. **UI Test:** Render Dashboard component and verify "Start Brainstorming" button appears for Phase 0 project.
